title: RE NJE / NJE RE
author: ABASID 1841
description: Teaching from THE ABASID CALIPHATE collection: RE NJE / NJE RE (The Outer/Foreign)

verses.text: Chigaro cha Mwari Mumwe chete, asi chino shanda sooo
Mwedzi mutete ne mwedzi mutete zvoumba ZUVA ☀️ Ndo kuti ini ndiri kudenga ndija tarisa pa nhova yako ndino ona
Mu RENJE 🧠 rako mune vamwe vadare vano Dhomoka Mukaona vasimuka , itai garai pasi mambo
Ndo pfungwa yeku nokora tsoka dze vamwe
Iwe se muridzi we SANGANO rako, uno fanira kudzikamisa sangano
Ukati ada ataura ada ataura, hazvi namatike
Ndo paye pamunenge makuti ndiri kutadza kufunga business se vamwe
Zvino reva kuti Mu SANGANO rako iri hamuchina hwai
Sangano rega rega chigaro cha MWARI
Brain yoga yoga chigaro cha MWARI
Hamusi meku gara uchi imba commander commander
Muno pedzesera makunakidza asi pasisina kuterera izwi
Kamwe chetewo kana kaviri omboita Commander Commander
Asi kwete kuzoita tserevende zuva rese
Kusa wirirana kwawo mufananidzo we kusa wirirana kwe mafungiro enyu
Mafungiro edu akava mamwe chete, ne masangano edu achava pamwe chete
Uye izwi rinobva rava rimwe chete
Tiri kugadzika musoro ka 🧠 Muviri uno funga munamato ka
Ndo zvandaiti ndaona muviri uchi humbwa mu bheterehema ka
Ahana chinomu misa kufunga zva ada
Akati ini kuno handina kusara ne mitemo, nekuti mitemo ndakapa pasi
Ukapa munhu chinhu, zvareva iwe uno sara uchi sisina
Pasi nde apa 🫀 mumunhu Moyo 🫀 pasi
ndiwo waka pihwa mitemo ichibva kudenga kuna

Vafunga ku uraya , vano kanda pfungwa iyoyo mupasi ku MUMWE UYO 🫀 Zvinenge zvava ku MUMWE UYO 🫀 kutarisa kuti BABA 🧠 pavakandipa mitemo, vakati vaka kanda pfungwa yakadai ndino fanira kui bvuma here kana kuiramba
BABA 🧠 vakanda havo pfungwa iyo, asi vakairamba Saka
Asi kuzo sarudza ne moyo wako kuchi ita, ndo mhosva
“Ini ndinoumba chiedza, ndikasika rima; ndinoita rugare, ndikasika zvakaipa; ini Jehovha, ndinoita izvi zvose.”
Maona ka NDO 🧠 Njere inogona kuku sikira hondo
Ndokubva aisa miti miviri pakati pawo
🧠 Pfungwa yeku nunura , inobva kuna Mwari
Pfungwa yekuisa poison inobva kuna MWARI🧠
IWE 🫀 mupasi kuziva pfungwa yawakanzi udye ne yawakanzi u
Sangano rako rikaita DVD muzambara , watova pama 1 😇 Moswera mushe 🫶☀️😇🙏🏻🧠
Kufara hangu , asi iye anosindi ridzirawo ndaka nyarara , saka ndambo muridzirawo
